folder_or_collection_check.name: folder_or_collection_check
folder_or_collection_check.value: "saved_requests"."folder_id" IS NOT NULL OR "saved_requests"."collection_id" IS NOT NULL

not_both_check.name: not_both_check
not_both_check.value: NOT ("saved_requests"."folder_id" IS NOT NULL AND "saved_requests"."collection_id" IS NOT NULL)

description.name: description
description.default: 'Help us improve by sharing your thoughts'
